summary: The phrase "store in a cool place" on pharmaceutical labels often corresponds to a refrigerator temperature range of 2–8°C, based on documented guidelines from major medications including Patisiran and Bamlanivimab. This reflects industry-standard practice where "cool" denotes controlled cooling without freezing, ensuring stability of sensitive therapeutic agents.
